lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰੀਐ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: paarabraham guradev sadaa hajooreeai |13|
lines.english: O Supreme Lord God, Divine Guru, You are always with me, ever-present. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਚਰਨਾ ਧੂਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: hoe pavitr sareer charanaa dhooreeai |
lines.english: By body is sanctified, by the dust of Your feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਉਚਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਮੰ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੰ ਸੁਨੰਤਿ ਸਬਦ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa ucharant naaman sravanan sunant sabad amritah |
lines.english: With my tongue, I chant the Lord's Name; with my ears, I listen to the Ambrosial Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੰ ਜਿਨਾ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਣਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tin sad balihaaran jinaa dhiaan paarabrahamanah |1|
lines.english: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to those who meditate on the Supreme Lord God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਈ ਧੰਨੁ ਜਿਨਾ ਪਿਰਹੜੀ ਸਚ ਸਿਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak seee dhan jinaa piraharree sach siau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed are those, who are in love with their True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭਿ ਕੂੜਾਵੇ ਕੰਮ ਇਕਸੁ ਸਾਈ ਬਾਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: habh koorraave kam ikas saaee baahare |
lines.english: All concerns are false, except those of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਤਿਨਾ ਜਿ ਸੁਨਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: sad balihaaree tinaa ji sunate har kathaa |
lines.english: I am forever a sacrifice to those who listen to the sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਲਿਖਹਿ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਸੇ ਹਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jas likheh beant soheh se hathaa |
lines.english: Those hands, which write the Praises of the infinite Lord are beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਰਧਾਨ ਨਿਵਾਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: poore te paradhaan nivaaveh prabh mathaa |
lines.english: Those who bow their heads before God are perfect and distinguished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰੁ ਸਗਲਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਥਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: santaan sang udhaar sagalaa dukh lathaa |14|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, they are emancipated; all their sorrows depart. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਚਾਲਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: charan puneet pavitr chaaleh prabh pathaa |
lines.english: Those feet which walk on God's Path are pure and holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਪਾਲ ਦਰਸ ਭੇਟੰ ਸਫਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਮਹੂਰਤਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gopaal daras bhettan safal naanak so mahooratah |1|
lines.english: Fruitful is that moment, O Nanak, when one obtains the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the Lord of the Universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਵੀ ਉਦੋਤ ਕਰਣੰ ਹਰਿ ਰਮਣੰ ਸੰਜੋਗ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhaavee udot karanan har ramanan sanjog pooranah |
lines.english: One's destiny is activated, when one chants the Lord's Name, through perfect good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾ ਵੇਲੜੀ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲੰਦੜੋ ਮਾ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saa velarree paravaan jit milandarro maa piree |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that time alone is approved, when my Beloved meets with me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮ ਨ ਸਕਾ ਪਾਇ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਤੀ ਹੂ ਬਾਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: keem na sakaa paae sukh mitee hoo baahare |
lines.english: Its value cannot be estimated; it brings peace beyond measure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਮੂਰਤੁ ਭਲਾ ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: so moorat bhalaa sanjog hai jit milai gusaaee |
lines.english: Blessed and auspicious is that moment, and that destiny, when I shall find the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਵੇਲਾ ਕਹੁ ਕਉਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: saa velaa kahu kaun hai jit prabh kau paaee |
lines.english: Tell me, what is that time, when I shall find God?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਕੈ ਮਨ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har dhiaae kai man ichh pujaaee |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, twenty-four hours a day, my mind's desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਸੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਿਵਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: vaddai bhaag satasang hoe niv laagaa paaee |
lines.english: By great good fortune, I have found the Society of the Saints; I bow and touch their feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: man darasan kee piaas hai naanak bal jaaee |15|
lines.english: My mind thirsts for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan; Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਸਰਬ ਦੋਖ ਨਿਵਾਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: patit puneet gobindah sarab dokh nivaaranah |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is the Purifier of sinners; He is the Dispeller of all distress.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਸੂਰ ਭਗਵਾਨਹ ਜਪੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saran soor bhagavaanah japant naanak har har hare |1|
lines.english: The Lord God is Mighty, giving His Protective Sanctuary; Nanak chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਡਿਓ ਹਭੁ ਆਪੁ ਲਗੜੋ ਚਰਣਾ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: chhaddio habh aap lagarro charanaa paas |
lines.english: Renouncing all self-conceit, I hold tight to the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਢਹਿ ਪਏ ਦੁਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mel laihu deaal dteh pe duaariaa |
lines.english: Unite with me, O Merciful Lord; I have fallen at Your Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਠੜੋ ਦੁਖ ਤਾਪੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੇਖੰਦਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nattharro dukh taap naanak prabh pekhandiaa |2|
lines.english: My sorrows and troubles have departed, O Nanak, beholding God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਭ੍ਰਮਤ ਬਹੁ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: rakh levahu deen deaal bhramat bahu haariaa |
lines.english: O Merciful to the meek, save me. I have wandered enough; now I am tired.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal teraa birad har patit udhaariaa |
lines.english: It is Your very nature to love Your devotees, and save sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੁ ਗਹਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਸਾਰਿਆ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: kar geh lehu deaal saagar sansaariaa |16|
lines.english: Take me by the hand, O Merciful Lord, and carry me across the world-ocean. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ਬਿਨਉ ਮੋਹਿ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin naahee koe binau mohi saariaa |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all; I offer this prayer to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੰ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗੇਣ ਓਟ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: niramalan sant sangen ott naanak paramesurah |1|
lines.english: One becomes immaculate and pure, by associating with the Saints, O Nanak, and taking the Protection of the Transcendent Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਉਧਰਣ ਦਇਆਲੰ ਆਸਰੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sant udharan deaalan aasaran gopaal keeratanah |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord is the Savior of the Saints; their only support is to sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲੁ ਥੀਵੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਪੰਦੜੋ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: seetal theevai naanakaa japandarro har naam |2|
lines.english: It only becomes cool, O Nanak, by chanting the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਦਨ ਚੰਦੁ ਨ ਸਰਦ ਰੁਤਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਮਿਟਈ ਘਾਂਮ ॥
lines.translit: chandan chand na sarad rut mool na mittee ghaam |
lines.english: The burning of the heart is not dispelled at all, by sandalwood paste, the moon, or the cold season.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਉਧਰੇ ਸਗਲ ਜਨ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal kee ott udhare sagal jan |
lines.english: Through the Protection and Support of the Lord's lotus feet, all beings are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭਏ ਮਨ ॥
lines.translit: sun parataap govind nirbhau bhe man |
lines.english: Hearing of the Glory of the Lord of the Universe, the mind becomes fearless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮੂਲਿ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨ ॥
lines.translit: tott na aavai mool sanchiaa naam dhan |
lines.english: Nothing at all is lacking, when one gathers the wealth of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਡੈ ਪੁਨ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa siau sang paaeeai vaddai pun |
lines.english: The Society of the Saints is obtained, by very good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਨਿਤ ਸੁਨ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har dhiaae har jas nit sun |17|
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, meditate on the Lord, and listen continually to the Lord's Praises. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਭਗਵਾਨਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਪਤ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: deaal purakh bhagavaanah naanak lipat na maaeaa |1|
lines.english: When the Lord God shows His Kindness, O Nanak, one is no longer engrossed in Maya. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਣੰ ਦੁਖ ਹਰਣੰ ਉਚਰਣੰ ਨਾਮ ਕੀਰਤਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: deaa karanan dukh haranan ucharanan naam keeratanah |
lines.english: The Lord grants His Grace, and dispels the pains of those who sing the Kirtan of the Praises of His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:
